NOTIRA-NOTIRA.title: Notira
NOTIRA-NOTIRA.description: Goddess of the Moonlit World, a being who travels through countless galgames, loves freeloading.
NOTIRA-NOTIRA.cardsModifierDescription: Notira's cards will appear in shops and rewards.
NOTIRA-NOTIRA.banter.alive.endTurnPing: Stuck? Go look up a guide.
NOTIRA-NOTIRA.goldMonologue: [sine]The goddess who gazes upon three thousand worlds...[/sine]...
